title: Infinite Potion Drinking
description: Potions are not consumed when drank
body:
## Overview

As the name itself says, this mod allows you to drink potions without consuming them

Is this overpowered? Probably, but otherwise I wouldn't even use potions at all

This is intentionally limited to normal potions, not affecting throwable ones

To balance, there is a config to set a duration multiplier for potions when drank

## Feedback

This mod also exists on curseforge, for any problem, leave a comment on the [curseforge project](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/infinitepotiondrinking).
